description: Perform an accessibility compliance check on the OpenICE interface using a Simulated Multiparameter Monitor and the Vital Signs clinical application. Document the interface with a full-resolution screenshot at /home/ga/original_ui.png. Generate a grayscale version of the screenshot at /home/ga/accessibility_proof_gray.png and record the mean luminance (0-255) in /home/ga/luminance_report.txt. Provide the script used for image processing at /home/ga/process_accessibility.py.
